_comment: Partial output of: aws cloudfront get-distribution-config --id EDFDVBD6EXAMPLE

DefaultCacheBehavior._cache_policy_note: This policy caches based on query strings but does NOT include Origin in the cache key. Responses are cached without varying on the Origin header.
DefaultCacheBehavior._origin_request_policy_note: PROBLEM: No origin request policy is set. The Origin, Access-Control-Request-Headers, and Access-Control-Request-Method headers are NOT forwarded to S3. S3 never sees the Origin header and cannot evaluate CORS rules even if they existed.

_fix._description: AWS managed policy that forwards Origin, Access-Control-Request-Headers, and Access-Control-Request-Method to the origin
